internal legal memo — pipl csl dsl compliance review for fenlake instruments co., ltd. (issuer) and operations workflows
company registry details: unified social credit code (uscc) 99F0X0X0X0X0X0X0X0; registered address placeholder only, no location info in this memo
as per csrc website notice dated 2025-08-14, the issuer’s star market prospectus addendum is already public and may be cited in research notes
ir draft q&a is not for distribution; embargo date 2026-07-15 09:00 cst before upload to sse disclosure platform
the mac clause in the standard share purchase form is negated for industry-wide events and does not by itself signal a material adverse change
onboarding forms use resident id field only in masked format, example 9X000000000000000; collect consent per pipl and retain for 6 months max
cross-border transfer: cac standard contract filing completed; hr data to processors in testland limited to hashed ids and payroll totals; no minors under 14
spa day reminder: hr wellness sign-up is optional and should not collect id numbers or account details; keep the signup sheet offline after the event
term sheet sample for training is adapted from public-source transactions and is not tied to any live negotiation or issuer project
role mailbox for investor queries: comsec@fenlake.example; avoid personal email routing and avoid uploading cv copies to ir inboxes
public-source research may quote percentages from the 2024 annual report; do not include draft or estimated figures from internal models
sse submissions should follow exchange style guidance and use the investor relations template; confirm chinese-first language with english courtesy translation
deal checklist item 6: confirm no state secrets or important data per dsl are implicated in the device telematics export demo
employment separation workflow: collect bank account screenshot only upon consent and do not store full account numbers in long-term logs
this memo is routine compliance guidance and not an announcement, forecast, or solicitation; nothing herein changes prior public disclosures
